StopCacheNodes.clientToken: Ensures idempotency of the API call
StopCacheNodes.cacheNodeIds: List of CacheNode IDs to be stopped
StopCacheNodes.migrateDataBeforeStop: Whether to migrate data before stopping the node, default is true. Stopping cache nodes without migrating data will reduce cache hit rates for ongoing read jobs; it is generally recommended to migrate data first unless there are special circumstances
